rationale.R1.1: Identifies central contradiction and proposes specific fixes, showing deep conceptual understanding.
rationale.R1.2: Walks through argument chain, flags key inconsistencies with detailed repairs.
rationale.R1.4: Points out missing citations and need for delta but doesn't fully map prior works.
rationale.RX.1: Flags uncertainties clearly and marks confidence for each recommendation.

rationale.RX.5: Traces major issues but lacks full annotation for minor edits.
